summary: Keep the project in closeout mode because Payments/IAP, TURN, Rust data-plane, and JWT/JWKS still require final evidence or external inputs.

blockers.name: Payments / IAP
blockers.next_action: Wait for real sandbox credentials and rerun diagnostics.

blockers.name: TURN / RTC
blockers.next_action: Provide TURN shared secret or hosted infra and recheck ice-servers response.

blockers.name: Rust data-plane
blockers.next_action: Produce new staging startup evidence for gateway, device-edge, and media-edge.

blockers.name: JWT / JWKS
blockers.next_action: Clarify issuer, verifier, JWKS publish/consume path, then rerun cross-service smoke.

why_not_open_new_phase: Remaining issues are closeout blockers rather than new feature objectives.
Starting a new phase now would blur owner semantics and hide unresolved integration gaps.
why_not_archive_current_phase: The project still needs fresh evidence and explicit blocker ownership before archive.
Governance artifacts would drift from actual blocker state if archived too early.
